creator: dch@freebsd.org
text: BTW cpe database seems a bit out of date - https://web.nvd.nist.gov/view/cpe/search/results?keyword=h2o&status=FINAL&orderBy=CPEURI&namingFormat=2.3 so I hope this doesn't confuse people. I have tried to keep security/vuxml 100% complete so that should be found in `pkg audit` and friends.
